news.headline: NVIDIA reveals DoRA as a better fine-tuning method for AI models, cutting inference costs. #tech #AI #NVIDIA
news.summary: NVIDIA has unveiled DoRA, a strong competitor to LoRA, which improves the fine-tuning of AI models without any extra inference expenses. This new technology is set to revolutionize the field by streamlining processes and boosting efficiency. For further details, refer to the latest news update.

news.headline: BitMEX updates index weights for Q3 2024, live since June 28. NEW weights in NEXT index family. #crypto #news
news.summary: The index weights for BitMEX in Q3 2024 have been revised and became effective on June 28, 2024. These updated weights are now incorporated into the NEXT index family.

news.headline: Learn about Gwei, the unit determining low gas fees on BNB Chain for cost-effective and efficient transactions.
news.summary: Learn about Gwei and its role in determining gas fees on the BNB Chain, optimizing transaction costs and enhancing blockchain functionality. Explore this mechanism to enjoy cost-effective transactions and streamlined operations.

news.headline: Latest data on industrial performance - check out Bloomberg for sector & industry stats. #industrials #Bloomberg
Futureverse agrees on partnership with Animoca Brands to elevate metaverse and AI ecosystems, enhancing technology stack and token ecosystem.
news.summary: A collaborative initiative between Futureverse and Animoca Brands has been launched, aimed at enhancing their metaverse technology capabilities and expanding their token ecosystem. This strategic partnership marks a significant step towards enriching both companies' offerings in the metaverse sector. The collaboration is expected to bring together the strengths of both entities to drive innovation and growth in the virtual reality space. Stay updated to witness the evolution of this partnership and its impact on the metaverse industry.

news.headline: Conservatives face challenge as Lib Dems gain ground.
IOTA Foundation awards $2.89M to 26 projects in latest funding round, covering DeFi, NFTs, SocialFi, and more.
news.summary: The IOTA Foundation has disclosed grants totaling $2.89 million for 26 initiatives. These projects will concentrate on various sectors such as DeFi, NFT marketplaces, SocialFi, and others.

news.headline: Coldplay is set to make history with their fifth headline show at Glastonbury, breaking a record.
Court allows majority of SEC claims in Binance case, but dismisses claim of BNB trading unlawfully on secondary markets due to Ripple precedent.
news.summary: Judge Amy Berman Jackson dismissed the Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) argument that the cryptocurrency BNB is being unlawfully traded on secondary markets. The judge referenced the Ripple decision while making this ruling.

news.headline: High living costs fuel protests in Kenya and Africa. Frustrations rise.
Comic and actor Martin Mull, famous for 'Fernwood Tonight,' passes away at the age of 80.
WikiLeaks founder Julian Assange reaches plea deal, ending lengthy legal battle. Avoids U.S. extradition and gains immediate freedom.
news.summary: The legal saga of Julian Assange, the founder of WikiLeaks, has come to a close with a plea deal. This deal allows him to avoid extradition to the U.S. and results in his immediate release. This development brings an end to a prolonged legal battle and provides Assange with relief from potential further legal proceedings.

news.headline: Walking Dead: Empires unveils Hero Card sales & monthly events, kicking off with Glenn. Weekly events offer players rewards.
news.summary: Introducing new features in The Walking Dead: Empires, with the launch of Hero Card sales and monthly events. The first hero in focus is Glenn, with players having the opportunity to engage in weekly events for various rewards. Find out more about these latest updates.

news.headline: BUJA adjourned its Extraordinary General Meeting to June 29, 2024, at 9:00 p.m. ET to engage with shareholders.
news.summary: In New York, NY, on June 28, 2024, Bukit Jalil Global Acquisition 1 Ltd. (NASDAQ: BUJA) convened its extraordinary general meeting (the “Extraordinary Meeting”) at 9:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The purpose was to adjourn the meeting from June 28, 2024, to June 29, 2024, at the same time, to give the Company more time to communicate with shareholders.

news.headline: Nevada Copper reports results from the 2024 Annual General Meeting, with 906,852,710 common shares represented, about 63.44% of the total outstanding.
news.summary: In YERINGTON, Nevada, the results of Nevada Copper's 2024 Annual General Meeting of shareholders were announced on June 28th. The meeting, which took place in Toronto, saw a total of 906,852,710 common shares represented by shareholders either in person or by proxy. This figure represents about 63.44% of the total 1,429,567,214 Common Shares that are currently outstanding. It was reported that shareholders showed their support by voting in favor of all agenda items during the Meeting.

news.headline: Wormhole boosts transaction efficiency with new flow-canceling Governor, supporting increased transactions for improved security and speed.
news.summary: A new mechanism called the flow-canceling Governor has been implemented by Wormhole to reduce delays and accommodate more transactions, thereby enhancing security and efficiency in cross-chain transfers. This system aims to handle a significant increase in transaction volume, addressing concerns regarding speed and reliability in cross-chain operations.

news.headline: Vietnam's economy surpasses expectations with strong growth fueled by trade and FDI influx.

New Glenn Hero Card for The Walking Dead: Empires launched by Gala Games, available in Common and Ancient versions on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: A new card called the Glenn Hero Card has been launched by Gala Games for The Walking Dead: Empires. This card is offered in both Common and Ancient editions, with sales starting on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: AssemblyAI boosts conversational intelligence with new features, aiding enterprises in extracting insights from audio data. #AI #integration
news.summary: AssemblyAI has launched a set of innovative features aimed at improving conversational intelligence for enterprises, facilitating a more thorough analysis of audio data. This development is pivotal for organizations seeking to extract valuable insights from audio content. These new features promise enhanced functionality and are poised to revolutionize the way businesses leverage audio data.

news.headline: LangChain releases LangGraph Cloud in closed beta and self-improving evaluators in LangSmith, presenting latest updates.
news.summary: LangChain has recently launched the LangGraph Cloud platform, currently in closed beta testing. Additionally, LangSmith now includes self-improving evaluators to enhance its performance. Users are encouraged to explore the new features and updates introduced in these platforms.

news.headline: Taiko, a Ethereum rollup protocol, celebrates one month on mainnet with rapid growth and ambitious goals.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in major financial centers such as New York, London, and Singapore, Taiko, a rollup protocol created to expand Ethereum's capacity, celebrates its successful one-month presence on the mainnet. The platform has demonstrated impressive progress and set ambitious goals for the future. In this short period, Taiko has garnered significant attention and engagement, establishing a strong foundation for growth and advancement in the coming months.

news.headline: Nubian announces meeting results and first tranche closing of private placement on June 28, 2024. (Total tranches not provided)
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Nubian Resources Ltd. shared positive outcomes from its latest annual and special shareholder meeting. The event took place today, with the company trading on TSX-V as NBR and OTCQB as NBRFF. Nubian expressed satisfaction in disclosing the Meeting results.

Oak Woods Acquisition Corporation extends completion window to 28/09/2024.
XP Inc. set pricing for US$500 million in 6.750% senior notes due 2029, closing on July 2, 2024.
news.summary: XP Inc., a prominent technology-driven financial platform in Brazil, revealed the pricing of an offering on June 27, 2024. This offering consists of US$500 million aggregate principal amount of 6.750% senior unsecured notes due 2029. The notes, which will be guaranteed by XP Investimentos S.A., are anticipated to finalize the transaction on July 2, 2024, pending the fulfillment of standard closing conditions. XP continues to be a trusted provider of low-fee financial products and services within the region.

news.headline: Billionaire predicts Bitcoin won't see a drastic increase; believes original vision unmet. #Bitcoin #PeterThiel
news.summary: Peter Thiel shares the view that Bitcoin's initial concept as a tool for freedom by cypherpunks and crypto-anarchists has not been fully realized.

news.headline: GreenPower Motor Company reports revenue of $39.3 million for fiscal 2024. Expanding manufacturing capabilities, with four-fold increase in school bus sales and investments in GP Truck Body. Conference call on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: GreenPower Motor Company Inc. reported its results for the year ended March 31, 2024, showing substantial progress in transitioning to a production plan driven by customer orders. GreenPower Chairman and CEO stated plans to expand manufacturing capabilities in California and West Virginia, invest in GP Truck Body, and secure production funding. The company completed its West Virginia manufacturing facility build-out and delivered the first all-electric school buses, with deliveries of four Nano BEAST and Nano BEAST Access buses in December 2023. GreenPower saw a four-fold increase in school bus sales and anticipates further growth in the current fiscal year. Significant investments were made in GP Truck Body to improve delivery times and offer seamless upfitting services. A conference call is scheduled for July 1, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. EDT to discuss these developments.

news.headline: Ailman warns: AI rally to falter soon.
Neuralink's brain-implant surgery delayed for its second patient.
news.summary: Last week, there was a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases reported in the country, with a total of 10,000 new cases recorded. This surge brings the total number of confirmed cases to 150,000, marking a concerning milestone in the ongoing pandemic. Health officials have attributed the spike to the spread of new variants of the virus and have urged the public to adhere to safety guidelines to curb further transmission. Additionally, the number of hospitalizations has also risen, with 800 new patients admitted in the past week, putting a strain on healthcare facilities. The government is closely monitoring the situation and considering implementing stricter measures to control the outbreak.

news.headline: Ecopetrol announces senior management changes. Board of Directors decisions made on June 28, 2024. (Numbers: BVC: ECOPETROL; NYSE: EC)
news.summary: Colombian company Ecopetrol S.A. (BVC: ECOPETROL; NYSE: EC) based in Bogota released a statement on June 28, 2024, regarding decisions made in a Board of Directors meeting held on the same day. The meeting led to the adoption of various resolutions focused on enacting the new organizational structure. No specific details were disclosed, however, the company plans to reveal the implementations in the near future.

news.headline: Ecopetrol appoints Gonzalo Hernández Jiménez as member of Audit and Risk Committee, June 28, 2024.
news.summary: In Bogota on June 28, 2024, Ecopetrol S.A. (BVC: ECOPETROL; NYSE: EC) announced that independent Director Gonzalo Hernández Jiménez has been appointed to the Audit and Risk Committee during the Board of Directors meeting held on the same date.

news.summary: The presidential debate recently garnered the smallest television audience since 2004, yet CNN's broadcast managed to rank among the top-rated programs of the year.

news.headline: Almonty's AGM report: 121,514,694 common shares represented, 252,589,498 outstanding, 76 shareholders voted by proxy.
news.summary: At their Annual General and Special Meeting on June 28, 2024, Almonty Industries Inc. (TSX:AII) (ASX:AII) (OTCQX:ALMTF) (FWB:ALI) reported on matters voted on in compliance with Section 11.3 of National Instrument 51-102, Continuous Disclosure Obligations. The meeting saw 121,514,694 common shares represented, out of a total of 252,589,498 issued and outstanding common shares as of the Record Date. A total of 76 shareholders voted by proxy at the meeting.

McGuire emphasizes need for public-private partnerships to stay competitive globally.
Paris Baguette to open second café in Tukwila City, Washington on June 29th, with 4,000 units globally. Franchisee Edwin Chang leads the way.
news.summary: Tukwila City resident Edwin Chang, a franchisee, will soon launch his inaugural Paris Baguette café at 17095 Southcenter Parkway, in Tukwila City, Washington, 98188. The bakery café chain, Paris Baguette, boasting 4,000 establishments worldwide, is experiencing rapid expansion. This development is scheduled for June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Activist Nicholas Snow, facing life-threatening neuromuscular disease, focuses on preserving legacy.
news.summary: Nicholas Snow, a Multimedia Entertainment Activist, is facing the progression of a life-threatening neuromuscular disease he was born with. He is now prioritizing the preservation of his legacy as the disease advances. Snow is thankful for his memoir, "Life Positive: A Journey to the Center of my Heart", which details his experience of living powerfully with HIV.

news.headline: HablaCuba.com's final call for Cubacel bonuses before promotion ends, offers sky-high incentives. Countdown nears its end.
news.summary: A popular website, HablaCuba.com, is currently running a limited-time promotion offering high bonuses for Cubacel. The countdown for this special deal is almost over, with the final opportunity to take advantage of it quickly approaching. This promotion presents a unique chance for users to enjoy significant bonuses, so act fast before time runs out.

news.headline: Palm Springs Pride 2024 themed "Be You" celebrates diversity and self-expression, attracting 200,000+ attendees.
news.summary: In 2024, Palm Springs Pride will be held under the inspiring theme "Be You," highlighting self-expression, inclusivity, and love in a city known for its embrace of diversity. Running from October 31 to November 3, the week-long celebration features a festival, parade, and various entertainment options. Drawing in a massive crowd of more than 200,000 attendees, the event has a substantial impact on the city, both culturally and economically.

news.headline: The Consulting Report reveals Top 50 Consulting Firms of 2024 in New York, with latest selection. Jun 28.
news.summary: The latest ranking of The Top 50 Consulting Firms of 2024 has been announced by The Consulting Report. The list includes top firms renowned for their expertise in various fields, such as digital transformation and strategic consulting. This year's selection features leading firms from across the globe, highlighting the industry's diversity and talent pool. New York saw the unveiling of the rankings on June 28, 2024. This prestigious list serves as a guide for businesses and individuals seeking top-tier consulting services, showcasing the best in the industry for the year.

news.headline: Author Helen Holdun fulfills dream of writing and publishing Love Later: A Love Story after raising three children.
news.summary: Due to various life circumstances, numerous individuals are often unable to pursue their dreams. However, for those who live long enough, cherished dreams continue to linger, urging them to pursue them. Following the upbringing of her three sons, Helen Holdun eventually heeded the call of her heart. Subsequently, years later,...
